mainText:
Promo: Bank of Entitlement-Where your sense of entitlement is our top priority!

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So there I was, strolling into a fancy restaurant like the absolute legend I am. Everyone turned to gaze at my impeccable style, with my "CEO of Entitlement" aura radiating effortlessly. I demanded the best table in the house, naturally. The hostess had the audacity to suggest a short wait, can you believe it? Well, I threw a fit that could rival a toddler in a toy store. I ranted about my importance, how my time was far too valuable to be kept waiting. Within minutes, I was seated at the VIP section-where I belonged, naturally. The look of defeat on the hostess's face was worth every second of the drama. I left a meager tip, of course, to remind them of their place. Ah, the perks of being Hot Josh, CEO of Entitlement.
